HeroSubtitle: Zero to AI is the ultimate interactive platform. Simulate neural networks, take dynamic quizzes, and learn alongside Zoa — your personal context-aware AI tutor.
AboutText: We bridge the gap between theoretical computer science and practical application. Powered by Gemini and Hugging Face, our platform adapts to your role, offering personalized AI avatars, smart study interventions, and hands-on algorithms.
Feature1Desc: A personalized space with dynamic themes. Admins get an AI Command Center to instantly identify and email at-risk students.
Feature2Desc: Don't just read. Run the simulations directly in your browser with our visual tools.
Feature3Desc: Stuck on a concept? Zoa is our built-in, context-aware AI assistant that remembers your conversations and guides you.
Feature4Desc: Test your knowledge with real-time feedback and dynamic questions that adapt to your skill level.
